title: TypeScript OOP: Code & Diagrams
description: A 10-question quiz about **OOP concepts** in TypeScript ‚Äî including inheritance, encapsulation, abstraction, and polymorphism ‚Äî illustrated with both **TypeScript code** and **UML class diagrams**.

options.text: It is abstract and must be overridden by subclasses
It is a shared concrete method all subclasses inherit
Encapsulation ‚Äî internal state is hidden behind methods
Polymorphism ‚Äî subclasses provide their own version of an inherited method
`Car` is composed of an `Engine` ‚Äî composition relationship
It must only implement one of the two interfaces
`schedule()` ‚Äî it is already implemented in the abstract class
Neither ‚Äî abstract classes have no concrete methods
